info.title: Courier API
info.description: The Courier API enables sending notifications across multiple channels (email, SMS, push, chat) to one or more recipients. It provides endpoints for sending messages, managing user profiles, lists, audiences, tenants, bulk jobs, brands, automations, notification templates, and more.

post.description: Send a message to one or more recipients across multiple channels.
Create a bulk job for sending messages to multiple recipients.

get.description: Retrieve details of a bulk job.

post.summary: Add users to a bulk job
post.description: Add users to an existing bulk job.
Trigger execution of a prepared bulk job.

get.summary: List users in a bulk job
get.description: Fetch users associated with a bulk job.

200.description: List of users in bulk job

get.description: Get profile data for a specific user.

post.description: Partial update of a user profile by merging provided data.

put.description: Full replacement of a user profile. All key-value pairs must be included.

get.description: Retrieve all device tokens for a user.

post.summary: Add device tokens to a user
post.description: Add multiple device tokens to a user.

get.description: Returns all subscriber lists with optional pattern filtering.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Filter using exact match or wildcard patterns (* or **)

delete.summary: Unsubscribe a user from a list

get.summary: Get preference for a specific topic

put.summary: Update preference for a specific topic

post.description: Create a new notification template in draft state.

to.description: Recipient specification (user_id, email, phone_number, list_id, audience_id)

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the send request

message.description: Message template for the bulk job

profile.description: Custom key-value pairs for the user profile

bearerAuth.description: API key from the Courier dashboard, passed as a Bearer token
